name: Memorial Park
description: Memorial Park is a place to play pickleball in Auburn, IN. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: The JAM Center
description: The JAM Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Garrett, IN. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: YMCA of DeKalb County
description: YMCA of DeKalb County is a place to play pickleball in Auburn, IN. There are 8 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms, water, and locker rooms. A membership is required to play.
